description: Style NoteThis summer is the season for fusion wear and bright hues, and creations by mineral embody these warm weather trends. These pieces are perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make heads turn without loosing her cool. Product DescriptionTurquoise flared empire-line dress with square neckline, narrow straps, panelled front with tucks and net overlays, elasticated smocking at back, lace at neckline, skirt with alternating horizontal bands of netMaterial and CareCotton blendMachine wash warmDo not bleachUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
